basic_details.job_title: NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER), Hajipur
basic_details.short_information: NIPER Hajipur is recruiting 1 Project Technical Support-I post, last date 11 July 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be informed to shortlisted candidates via email

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application.
qualification.education_qualification: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Two years’ experience in relevant subject in medical laboratory or research laboratories
qualification.experience: Experience in in-vitro microbiological assays and in-vivo animal experiments, preferably with knowledge of handling Mycobacterium tuberculosis culture and DST methods

how_to_apply: The interested candidates may submit CV with cover letter and scanned copies of supporting documents (Educational Qualification and Experience) in a single PDF through email (mention the post name in subject) to [email protected] and [email protected].
important_instructions: This is a purely contractual/temporary position and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Interview will be conducted in Physical/Online mode. Candidate who can join within 20 days of selection will be preferred. All posts will be governed as per terms and conditions of ICMR. Late applications will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Hajipur has officially released Employment Notification No: NIPER-HJP/PA/ICMR/SG/2026-27/CDR-43 dated 22/06/2026 for engagement of 1 Project Technical Support-I on contractual basis under the ICMR project. The notification includes complete details on post, emoluments, eligibility, responsibilities, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

content_sections.heading: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIPER Hajipur is recruiting 1 Project Technical Support-I post, last date 11 July 2026.

rows.date: Will be informed to shortlisted candidates via email

content_sections.heading: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for Project Technical Support-I under the ICMR project.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application.

rows.details: Not more than 28 years (relaxation to SC/ST/OBC as per Central Govt. norms)
10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Two years’ experience in relevant subject in medical laboratory or research laboratories
Experience in in-vitro microbiological assays and in-vivo animal experiments, preferably with knowledge of handling Mycobacterium tuberculosis culture and DST methods
Candidate should be flexible to travel and work at NIPER-Hajipur & ICMR-NIRT, Chennai

content_sections.heading: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: The interested candidates may submit CV with cover letter and scanned copies of supporting documents (Educational Qualification and Experience) in a single PDF through email (mention the post name in subject) to [email protected] and [email protected] .

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a purely contractual/temporary position and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Interview will be conducted in Physical/Online mode. Candidate who can join within 20 days of selection will be preferred. All posts will be governed as per terms and conditions of ICMR. Late applications will not be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 is 11 July 2026 (5:00 PM). Candidates must send their CV, cover letter, and supporting documents in a single PDF via email before the deadline. Applications received after the closing date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NIPER Hajipur has announced 1 vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support-I under an ICMR-funded research project. The vacancy is available under the Unreserved (UR) category. Interested candidates should apply early to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must have passed 10th Standard along with a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT/DMLT) and possess two years of relevant work experience in a medical or research laboratory. Candidates with additional experience in microbiological research will have an added advantage during the selection process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-I post is 28 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation for candidates belonging to SC, ST, OBC, and other reserved categories will be provided according to Central Government and ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What salary is offered under NIPER Hajipur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly remuneration of Rs. 18,000 plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible under the project rules. Since the position is funded through an ICMR project, the salary and benefits will be governed by the project's terms and conditions.

faq.question: Q6. What are the important instructions for candidates applying to NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should ensure that all required documents are attached in a single PDF and submitted before the deadline. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview, and applicants who can join within 20 days of selection will be preferred. Late or incomplete applications will be rejected without further consideration.
